The '''Great Plague''' was the greatest of all offworld afflictions that the [[X'Ting]] race experienced some 100 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Many of the X'Ting survivors believed that the plague was unleashed by the executives of [[Cestus Cybernetics]].
